hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "main" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "HEAD" ]; then git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null; git checkout main 2>/dev/null; git merge --ff-only "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null && git push origin main 2>/dev/null; git checkout "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; fi; true
